site.tagline: Edmond's Premier Bathroom Remodeling — Design, Build & Done Right

seo.meta_title: Bathroom Remodeling in Edmond, OK | Edmond Bathroom Remodeling
seo.meta_description: Professional bathroom remodeling in Edmond, OK. Licensed & insured. Free estimates. Call (405) 281-3672.

faqs.q: How much does a bathroom remodel cost in Edmond, OK?
faqs.a: Bathroom remodels in Edmond typically range from $7,500 to $22,000. A basic refresh runs $7,500–$11,000, mid-range $11,000–$16,000, and full luxury remodel $16,000–$25,000+. We provide free in-home estimates.

faqs.q: How long does a bathroom remodel take in Edmond?
faqs.a: Most bathroom remodels take 2–4 weeks. Simple cosmetic updates finish in 1–2 weeks. Full gut-and-remodel projects with plumbing and tile take 3–5 weeks.

faqs.q: Do you handle permits with the City of Edmond?
faqs.a: Yes — we manage all City of Edmond building permits. Oklahoma requires permits for plumbing and electrical modifications in bathroom remodels.

faqs.q: Can you convert a tub to a walk-in shower?
faqs.a: Absolutely — tub-to-shower conversions are one of our most popular projects. We design custom tile showers, glass enclosures, and barrier-free options.

faqs.q: Do you serve Oklahoma City, Yukon, and Mustang?
faqs.a: Yes — we serve all of the OKC metro including Edmond, Oklahoma City, Yukon, Mustang, Piedmont, Norman, Moore, and surrounding communities.
